title: SNITCH x BISMIL Double Pocket Floral Overshirt
description: This collection is a celebration of Indian soul and style, created in collaboration with Bismil — a contemporary Sufi artist whose voice bridges tradition and youth culture. Known for reimagining Indian music for the modern era, Bismil’s journey inspires silhouettes that blend timeless craftsmanship with fresh design. Featuring artwork inspired by the intricate musical themes of Mughal and Rajasthani miniature paintings, each piece honors the spirit of heritage, made modern. Floral motifs in earthy tones elevate this relaxed-fit Overshirt, crafted from 100% cotton for breathable comfort. Featuring full sleeves and a spread collar, it blends casual elegance with versatile styling. Perfect for layering, it offers a refined yet approachable aesthetic for everyday wear.
